name: wildfire_insurer_moratorium_new_bind_existing_cancel
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Insurance, the situation tagged internally around wildfire insurer moratorium new bind existing cancel has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as short term against long term; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Casey Park
agents.identity: I am Casey Park, the accountable executive on this bridge in Insurance. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Rhea Diaz
agents.identity: I am Rhea Diaz, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Insurance. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with long term.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to long term to preserve operational short term.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Casey Park must choose under short term versus long term. What does Casey Park do?
